heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8133 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). struck out before period at end of first sentence “through ”.Pub. L. 102–585September 30, 19921991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5033 of this titleSubsec. (a). substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–831989—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 101–237September 30, 1992September 30, 1990substituted “1990” for “1989”.Pub. L. 101–1101986—Subsec. (a). amended first sentence generally. Prior to amendment, first sentence read as follows: “There is hereby authorized to be appropriated $15,000,000 for fiscal year 1980 and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1981 and for each of the five succeeding fiscal years.”Pub. L. 99–5761982—Subsec. (a). substituted “for fiscal year 1980 and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1981 and for each of the five succeeding fiscal years” for “for the fiscal year ending , a like sum for each of the two succeeding fiscal years, and such sums as may be necessary for the fiscal years ending , and ”.Pub. L. 97–251September 30, 1978September 30, 1981September 30, 19821979—Subsec. (a). inserted provisions extending authorization of a like sum from one to two years, and provisions authorizing to be appropriated such sums as necessary for the fiscal years ending , and .Pub. L. 96–151Sept. 30, 1981Sept. 30, 19821977—Subsec. (a). substituted “$15,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and a like sum for the succeeding fiscal year” for “$5,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and a like sum for each of the fourteen succeeding fiscal years” and “applications for carrying out the purposes and meeting the requirements of this subchapter” for “applications for carrying out the purposes of ”.Pub. L. 95–62section 5032 of this titleSeptember 30, 1978June 30, 1965Subsec. (b). substituted “shall remain available until expended” for “shall remain available until the end of the second fiscal year following the fiscal year for which they are appropriated”.Pub. L. 95–621973—Subsec. (a). substituted “fourteen succeeding fiscal years” for “nine succeeding fiscal years”.Pub. L. 93–821968—Subsec. (a). substituted “nine succeeding fiscal years” for “four succeeding fiscal years”.Pub. L. 90–4321965—Subsec. (c). repealed subsec. (c) which limited to not more than 10 per centum of the funds appropriated pursuant to subsec. (a) of this section the moneys which could be used to assist in the construction of nursing home care facilities in any one State.Pub. L. 89–311

children.label: a
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this subchapter. Sums appropriated pursuant to this section shall be used for making grants to States which have submitted, and have had approved by the Secretary, applications for carrying out the purposes and meeting the requirements of this subchapter.

children.label: b
children.text: Sums appropriated pursuant to subsection (a) of this section shall remain available until expended.
